informal_statement.text:
Sort a mutable slice of integers in nondecreasing order using insertion sort. The function mutates its input in place and returns nothing.

Benchmark note (sorting_insertion_sort_006): Variant 6 stresses adversarial small inputs (n<=3 style) while preserving asymptotic-agnostic correctness.
Authoring lens: Lens 6 guards against proof sketches that only discuss big instances.
required_properties: the resulting slice is sorted in nondecreasing order
the resulting slice is a permutation of the original slice
the function terminates on every input
